name: Metacognitive Memory
description: L0~L6 cognitive memory system with privacy controls. WARNING: May contain sensitive data. Only enable allowConversationAccess=true if you want automatic conversation capture. Disable in workspaces with credentials, regulated data, or proprietary prompts.

allowConversationAccess.description: OPT-IN ONLY. When true, automatically captures message:received/message:sent events as L0 raw logs. Only enable if you want persistent conversation logging. Disable for sensitive contexts.

allowPromptInjection.description: OPT-IN ONLY. When true, automatically injects recent L0/L1 memories into the agent prompt via before_prompt_build hook. Enable if you want the agent to have contextual memory awareness. May increase token usage.

l0InjectLimit.description: Number of L0 records to inject into prompt (0 = disabled). Recommended: 3. Lower = fewer tokens.

l1InjectLimit.description: Number of L1 records to inject into prompt (0 = disabled). Recommended: 5. Lower = fewer tokens.

crossSessionInjectLimit.description: Number of cross-session L0 records to inject for new sessions (0 = disabled). Recommended: 5. Helps agent remember previous conversations.

stateDir.description: Custom state directory for SQLite memory files. Defaults to OpenClaw state directory.

l3UpdateThreshold.description: Minimum number of L1 memories accumulated before triggering L3 graph update.

defaultRetentionDays.description: Default retention period in days for memory data.
